A/B Test Report — 2026-05-24

Base config: config.yaml (hash: 9ec55519)

Arm A: fixed_baseline

strategy:
  name: ml_factor
  ml_factor:
    factors:
    - momentum_20
    - macd_hist
    - rsi_centered_14
    - ma_distance_20
    - vol_ratio_5
    - boll_position_20
    factors_file: null
    horizon: 5
    train_window: 250
    min_train_samples: 60
    refit_every: 20
    panel_mode: pooled
    training_universe: pool
    share_pool_fit: true
    embargo_days: null
    label_type: return
    selector:
      type: lasso
      lasso:
        alpha: 0.001
        max_iter: 1000
        tol: 1.0e-06
      lightgbm:
        num_leaves: 15
        min_data_in_leaf: 20
        learning_rate: 0.05
        num_iterations: 200
        max_depth: 4
        random_state: 42
        top_k_factors: 20
        min_importance_ratio: 0.01
        verbose: -1
    weighter:
      type: ic
      ic:
        use_rank: true
        min_abs_ic: 0.0
      ir:
        n_chunks: 6
        use_rank: true
        min_abs_ir: 0.0
      equal: {}
      lightgbm:
        num_leaves: 15
        min_data_in_leaf: 20
        learning_rate: 0.05
        num_iterations: 200
        max_depth: 4
        random_state: 42
        verbose: -1
    thresholds:
      strong_buy: 0.9
      buy: 0.7
      sell: 0.3
      strong_sell: 0.1
    buy_verdicts:
    - buy
    - strong_buy
    sell_verdicts:
    - sell
    - strong_sell
    refresh_verdicts:
    - strong_buy
backtest:
  equity_curve_holding_days:
  - 10
  forward_days: null
  risk_free_rate: null
  costs: null
  engine: null
  sizing:
    type: fixed
    fixed:
      size: 0.1
    vol_target:
      reference_vol_annual: 0.3
      vol_window: 20
      min_size: 0.03
      max_size: 0.2
      fallback_to: fixed
  position_size: null
  max_concurrent_lots: null

16 succeeded, 0 failed.

strategy:
  name: ml_factor
  ml_factor:
    factors:
    - momentum_20
    - macd_hist
    - rsi_centered_14
    - ma_distance_20
    - vol_ratio_5
    - boll_position_20
    factors_file: null
    horizon: 5
    train_window: 250
    min_train_samples: 60
    refit_every: 20
    panel_mode: pooled
    training_universe: pool
    share_pool_fit: true
    embargo_days: null
    label_type: return
    selector:
      type: lasso
      lasso:
        alpha: 0.001
        max_iter: 1000
        tol: 1.0e-06
      lightgbm:
        num_leaves: 15
        min_data_in_leaf: 20
        learning_rate: 0.05
        num_iterations: 200
        max_depth: 4
        random_state: 42
        top_k_factors: 20
        min_importance_ratio: 0.01
        verbose: -1
    weighter:
      type: ic
      ic:
        use_rank: true
        min_abs_ic: 0.0
      ir:
        n_chunks: 6
        use_rank: true
        min_abs_ir: 0.0
      equal: {}
      lightgbm:
        num_leaves: 15
        min_data_in_leaf: 20
        learning_rate: 0.05
        num_iterations: 200
        max_depth: 4
        random_state: 42
        verbose: -1
    thresholds:
      strong_buy: 0.9
      buy: 0.7
      sell: 0.3
      strong_sell: 0.1
    buy_verdicts:
    - buy
    - strong_buy
    sell_verdicts:
    - sell
    - strong_sell
    refresh_verdicts:
    - strong_buy
backtest:
  equity_curve_holding_days:
  - 10
  forward_days: null
  risk_free_rate: null
  costs: null
  engine: null
  sizing:
    type: vol_target

      size: 0.1
    vol_target:
      reference_vol_annual: 0.3
      vol_window: 20
      min_size: 0.03
      max_size: 0.2
      fallback_to: fixed
  position_size: null
  max_concurrent_lots: null

    panel_mode: pooled
    training_universe: pool
    share_pool_fit: true
    embargo_days: null
    label_type: return
    selector:
      type: lasso
      lasso:
        alpha: 0.001
        max_iter: 1000
        tol: 1.0e-06
      lightgbm:
        num_leaves: 15
        min_data_in_leaf: 20
        learning_rate: 0.05
        num_iterations: 200
        max_depth: 4
        random_state: 42
        top_k_factors: 20
        min_importance_ratio: 0.01
        verbose: -1
    weighter:
      type: ic
      ic:
        use_rank: true
        min_abs_ic: 0.0
      ir:
        n_chunks: 6
        use_rank: true
        min_abs_ir: 0.0
      equal: {}
      lightgbm:
        num_leaves: 15
        min_data_in_leaf: 20
        learning_rate: 0.05
        num_iterations: 200
        max_depth: 4
        random_state: 42
        verbose: -1
    thresholds:
      strong_buy: 0.9
      buy: 0.7
      sell: 0.3
      strong_sell: 0.1
    buy_verdicts:
    - buy
    - strong_buy
    sell_verdicts:
    - sell
    - strong_sell
    refresh_verdicts:
    - strong_buy
recommend_pool:
  enabled: true
  top_n: 30
  min_avg_amount_20d: 50000000.0
  max_per_industry: 5
  refresh: weekly
  cache_dir: data/recommend_pool
  industry_map_max_age_days: 30
  industry_source: auto
